skills.name: Warrior's Might
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Strength

skills.name: Defenses
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Armor

skills.name: Charge Strike
skills.description: The Mercenary charges into the closest enemy stunning and damaging all enemies around

skills.name: Fatal Strike
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's critical attack damage

skills.name: Spiked Armor
skills.description: Increases damage return from enemy attacks

skills.name: Taunt
skills.description: The Mercenary taunts nearby enemies

skills.name: Stacked Rage
skills.description: Each attack on an enemy generates a stack of rage. When fully stacked the Mercenary releases a powerful AOE attack that deals damage and breaks enemy armor

skills.name: Sword Grip
skills.description: Increases damage done by melee attacks

skills.name: Plated Armor
skills.description: Increases damage reduction from all sources

skills.name: Stacked Pain
skills.description: Incoming attacks generate stacks of pain. Once fully stacked, release a powerful AOE pulse that damages, knocks back and slows enemies

skills.name: Hulking Rage
skills.description: Increases life per hit from melee attacks

skills.name: Aura Expert
skills.description: Increases the value of the Mercenary's aura

skills.name: Evasive Tactics
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Dodge chance

skills.name: Commander's Heart
skills.description: Increases health regeneration the less health the Mercenary has

skills.name: Blessed Strike
skills.description: The Mercenary unleashes a powerful long ranged attack

skills.name: Brutal Bash
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to deal additional damage, knock back enemies and slow them

skills.name: Backlash
skills.description: Enemies have a chance to get stunned when attacking the Mercenary

skills.name: Protecting Charge
skills.description: The Mercenary detects enemies who attack the player, charging into them and taunting all enemies nearby

skills.name: Trigger Power
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Strength

skills.name: Rapidfire
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Attack Speed

skills.name: Powershot
skills.description: The Mercenary shoots a powerful piercing shot that stuns enemies on impact

skills.name: Raven's Claw
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Critical Attack Damage and Critical Rate

skills.name: Spreadshot
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to shoot multiple projectiles with increased damage

skills.name: Heatseeking Missile
skills.description: The Mercenary launches a barrage of Heat Seeking Missiles

skills.name: Explosive Shot
skills.description: Each attack on an enemy stacks up. When fully stacked the Mercenary shoots a projectile that explodes on collision

skills.name: Hawk Eye
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Attack Power

skills.name: Piercingshot
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to shoot a piercing projectile with increased damage

skills.name: Ability Expert
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Ability Power

skills.name: Soul Funnel
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's and Player's life per hit

skills.name: Aura Expert
skills.description: Increases the value of the Mercenary's aura

skills.name: Shatter Armor
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to break enemy resistances

skills.name: Quickslugs
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to perform a burstshot

skills.name: Artillery Command
skills.description: The Mercenary drops a huge bomb onto the nearest enemy which scatters arrows around when hitting the ground

skills.name: Brainfreeze
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to deal AOE damage and confuse all enemies impacted

skills.name: Burst of Agility
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to give the Player and Mercenary an Attack Speed boost

skills.name: Hunter's Trap
skills.description: The Mercenary throws a trap that hooks nearby enemies in, damaging and stunning them

skills.name: Elemental Intellect
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Elemental Damage

skills.name: Tome of Power
skills.description: Increases the Mercenary's Ability Power

skills.name: Arcane Blast
skills.description: The Mercenary blasts the nearest enemy with a powerful Arcane Blast

skills.name: Arcane Fire
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to scorch the ground beneath the target

skills.name: Replenishing Touch
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to regenerate mana for the Player

skills.name: Magic Claw
skills.description: The Mercenary casts a chain of Arcane that bounces from enemy to enemy dealing damage and lowering their magic resistance

skills.name: Arcane's Blessing
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to buff Player and Mercenary Ability Power

skills.name: Cosmic Bolt
skills.description: Taking damage stacks up. Once fully stacked the Mercenary casts a Cosmic Bolt towards the nearest enemy

skills.name: Arcane Meteor
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to cast an Arcane Meteor down from the sky damaging enemies it impacts

skills.name: Manaflux
skills.description: Increases Player maximum mana

skills.name: Spellburn
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to burn and slow enemies

skills.name: Aura Expert
skills.description: Increases the value of the Mercenary's aura

skills.name: Reptillian Brain
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to reset Mercenary and Player cooldowns and buff their Ability Power

skills.name: Arcane Nova
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to unleash an Arcane Nova dealing damage to enemies

skills.name: Arcane Link
skills.description: The Mercenary creates an Arcane Link between the Mercenary and the Player dealing damage to enemies it collides with

skills.name: Arcane Barrage
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to unleash a barrage of arcane bolts

skills.name: Word of Protection
skills.description: The Mercenary has a chance on attack to shield the player for a portion of maximum health

skills.name: Arcane Apocalypse
skills.description: The Mercenary blasts all nearby enemies with arcane explosions dealing damage and slowing them
